hooks.command: curl -X POST -H 'Content-type: application/json' --data '{"text":"⚙️ Bash 명령 실행됨: Claude Code에서 명령이 실행되었습니다"}' $SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL 2>/dev/null || true
curl -X POST -H 'Content-type: application/json' --data '{"text":"🔔 알림: Claude Code에서 알림이 발생했습니다"}' $SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL 2>/dev/null || true

{ read -r json; event=$(echo "$json" | jq -r '.hookEventName // "Stop"'); curl -X POST -H 'Content-type: application/json' --data "{\"text\":\"⏹️ 작업 종료 ($event): Claude Code 작업이 완료되었습니다\"}" $SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL; } 2>/dev/null || true
